title: M53 DW and robust moment notation rewrite
summary: Completed M53 notation rewrite: Section 3 now uses e_t(B) recovered-shock notation for the source-correct DW menu, and Section 4 now displays the robust stack as explicit moment equations with fourth-order covariance-product subtractions.

user_inputs.text: Work on task M53: replace the Section 3 h_i(B) notation with e_t(B) recovered-shock notation and rewrite Section 4 robust conditions as explicit moment equations rather than foregrounding cumulant notation.

agent_actions.description: Rewrote manuscript/draft.md Section 3 to remove h_i(B) notation and display DW GMM1/GMM2 with e_t(B).
Rewrote manuscript/draft.md Section 4 to display G_H(B) as explicit third- and fourth-order moment equations, preserving covariance-product subtractions.
Updated the formal registry, task packet, task board, dashboard, paper map, workplan, and logs; preserved M52 as the next evidence rebuild gate.
